title: port_str uses to_string() then as_str() — unnecessary round-trip
description: device.rs:57-58 and connection.rs:187-188: 'let port_str = port.to_string(); let port_c = CString::new(port_str.as_str())'. The intermediate binding port_str is only used to call .as_str(). The idiomatic form is CString::new(port.to_string()) — the String is passed directly, since CString::new accepts Into<Vec<u8>> which String satisfies. The .as_str() call and the named binding are noise.
